1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 5.0.19 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/io-package.json).

1078.issue: [W1078] "common.materialize" is deprecated for admin >= 5 at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/io-package.json). Please use property "common.adminUI.config".

1084.issue: [W1084] "common.title" is deprecated and replaced by "common.titleLang". Please remove from [io-package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/io-package.json).

3013.issue: [W3013] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v1".

3015.issue: [W3015] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-adapter@v1".

3017.issue: [W3017] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1".

3024.issue: [W3024] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix uses node.js 18 which is not in the list of recommended testing versions (20, 22, 24).

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": no "check-and-lint" job found in [run #531](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/actions/runs/19363933191). Cannot verify "npm run test:package" output.

3052.issue: [W3052] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for job "adapter-tests (24.x, windows-latest)" in [run #531](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/actions/runs/19363933191).

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/siegenia.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "events" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:events" instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#339] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/issues/339)

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9506.issue: [E9506] i18n directory "admin/i18n" is excluded by .npmignore. Translations will be missing from the npm package.

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=18" allows Node.js 18.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=20" at [package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/package.json).

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-license 4.0.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/package.json)

0082.issue: [S0082] A newer version (0.3.0) for package "@apollon/iobroker-tools" (dependencies) exists. The newer version has been published for more than 700 days. Please evaluate if upgrading from 0.2.1 to 0.3.0 is possible.

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.10.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.siegenia/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 18. Downgrade to node.js 18.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
